title: Verify existing implementation of breadcrumb component
description: The Breadcrumb component already exists at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx with the required props interface (items: { label: string; href?: string }[]), correct rendering logic (active/last item as plain text, others as links), and comprehensive unit tests in src/components/ui/breadcrumb.test.tsx. CSS module also exists at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.module.css.
existing_patterns: src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx - Breadcrumb component with items array prop, active item rendering, and CSS module styling
src/components/ui/breadcrumb.test.tsx - Unit tests using @testing-library/react and vitest
